name: Patterson-Gimlin Massacre
summary: A tape supposedly showing a bigfoot sighting, The theory states that this tape was taken directly after the rest of the tribe of these creatures were slaughtered by the filmers.
evidence_for: Just as evidence contrary to established history and sciences can be destroyed to maintain a common narrative, abnormal entities like a species of bigfoot could easily be hunted by secretive government workers, akin to the “Men In Black"  theory

name: Oil Pit Squid
summary: In Indiana, a small squid was discovered within a natural oil pit, miles away from any natural habitats of the squid.
evidence_for: If the world is a simulation, then undoubtedly certain things would take more data than others, such as living creatures taking far more power to properly simulate than non living entities. If this is the case, then perhaps the compressed essence of.

name: People of the Mount
summary: Rumors of locals near Mount Shasta speak of a collection of large, hooded figures entering and exiting the mountain. This mountain is also adjacent to the supposed sunken continent named Lemuria. A researcher in 1904 went within the mountain and reported miles of hollow passageways filled with gold and jewels, but disappeared before a return journey could be made.
evidence_for: If certain societies have evolved past the point of time travel, they haven’t much of a reason to stay in their current time, especially if they can bring themselves, their luxuries, or even entire sections of land from their futuristic world into.

name: Crystal Skulls
summary: A collection of 13 crystal skulls found in various areas across the planet, all identical in makeup, but found in wildly different areas. Some state that these skulls have energy and memories within them which can be accessed and contributed to by humans.
evidence_for: In the modern-day, we are currently harvesting the earth for a number of nonrenewable natural resources. Perhaps in humanity’s previous cycles, they did the same, and had access to technology that is no longer able to be produced due to the.
